data.title: ABB acquires Premium Power to enhance advisory services in Europe for its customers, expanding expertise.
data.description: In Zurich, ABB announced that it has finalized a deal to purchase Premium Power, aiming to enhance its consulting services for customers in Europe. The acquisition is part of ABB's strategy to broaden its advisory offerings, combining expertise and resources. This move signifies ABB's commitment to expanding its market presence and providing more comprehensive solutions.

data.title: Yuzhong District in Chongqing promotes global gateway role with #MeetYuzhong series. Vlogger Jason showcases logistics hubs. Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: In Chongqing, China on February 13, 2026, the Yuzhong District Government unveiled the newest installment of its "Meet Yuzhong" global media series. This episode showcases foreign vlogger Jason exploring the district's logistics centers and commercial establishments.

data.title: Aave Labs aims for $50M grant to fund DAO; $50M package questioned by community over possible voting power concentration.
data.description: Certain individuals within the community have raised concerns regarding the scale of the $50 million funding allocation and have expressed apprehensions that the suggested AAVE token grant may result in the consolidation of voting authority.
